subtitle: A warm, funny slot celebration from Norma Jean
bigline: Spin for snacks, laughs, grandkids, pets, and cozy TV drama.
marqueeTemplate: Spin {{spin}} for Faye and see what the birthday reels reveal

welcome.title: Welcome to Faye's Birthday Slots
paragraphs: Norma Jean made this just for Faye with love, laughs, and a few very official snack-based casino rules.
Expect Little Debbie treats, YouTube time, pets, grandkids, and just enough reality TV drama to keep the reels interesting.
No real gambling here, just birthday fun and family love.
welcome.overrideLine: The birthday committee will be auditing every spin with completely unnecessary confidence.

scoreboard.title: Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: Cash mode is off, so every prize is paid in laughs, love, and bragging rights.

rules: Every prize is for fun, love, and celebration.
The birthday committee may object, but the reels have final authority.
Staying up late is allowed because this is a special occasion.
Little Debbie snacks improve reel performance, according to unofficial research.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Birthday Result
finale.note: Faye wins the official family celebration, approved with love from Norma Jean.

footer: Made with love for Faye from Norma Jean

customerInputs.oneThingEveryoneKnows: Sleeps late and stays up at night

claim.template: This prize is for birthday fun only and can be claimed with hugs, laughs, and full family bragging rights from Norma Jean.

slots.marqueeTemplate: Spin {{spin}} for Faye and see what the birthday reels reveal

prizes.title: Party Starter
prizes.msg: The reels say the celebration has officially begun.

prizes.title: Queen Treatment
prizes.msg: Faye wins royal treatment for the day, with extra kindness and no committee objections.

prizes.title: Cozy Pass
prizes.msg: This prize includes guilt-free relaxing, late-night scrolling, and sleeping in like a champion.

prizes.title: Laugh Bonus
prizes.msg: A bonus laugh has been added to the official celebration total.

prizes.title: Snack Jackpot
prizes.msg: The reels strongly recommend Little Debbie's and no one should argue with snack science.

prizes.title: Drama Marathon
prizes.msg: The Bachelor, Sister Wives, and 1000-lb Sisters have entered the celebration lineup.

prizes.title: Pet Parade
prizes.msg: Pets and grandkids bring the kind of joy no slot machine could ever beat.

prizes.title: Official Audit
prizes.msg: The birthday committee reviewed the spin and declared Faye suspiciously lovable.

prizes.title: Committee Ruling
prizes.msg: The birthday committee tried to object, but Norma Jean's love overruled everything.

prizes.title: Love From Mom
prizes.msg: Norma Jean is celebrating her daughter with love, pride, and a heart full of joy.

prizes.title: Golden Ticket
prizes.msg: This premium prize unlocks extra birthday attention and a victory lap around the living room.

prizes.title: Jackpot Winner
prizes.msg: The final reels declare Faye the grand winner of love, laughs, snacks, and family celebration.
